markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Handoff new clients and refine the process for managing technical content expectations.](https://fathom.video/share/teAYxVNVVr7U_c4BzH4SNqbwSgKgD3js?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**JAMA Software poses a technical content risk.** The client's demand for "technical quality that won't embarrass JAMA" conflicts with our standard workflow, which is not designed for subject matter expert (SME) depth.](https://fathom.video/share/teAYxVNVVr7U_c4BzH4SNqbwSgKgD3js?tab=summary&timestamp=702.0)
  - [**A new strategy is required for technical clients.** It combines upfront expectation-setting (we are not SMEs) with internal pipeline customization (e.g., training on "good examples") to meet quality standards.](https://fathom.video/share/teAYxVNVVr7U_c4BzH4SNqbwSgKgD3js?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)
  - [**Aida will lead the JAMA kickoff.** The kickoff will use a discovery-focused format to accommodate a tight timeline and the client's need to share product details.](https://fathom.video/share/teAYxVNVVr7U_c4BzH4SNqbwSgKgD3js?tab=summary&timestamp=1492.0)
  - [**Process improvements are needed.** The current 2-week pre-kickoff prep window is consistently missed. The team will focus on stabilizing the existing system before adding new steps.](https://fathom.video/share/teAYxVNVVr7U_c4BzH4SNqbwSgKgD3js?tab=summary&timestamp=1705.0)

## Topics

### Process Improvement: Pre-Kickoff Prep

  - [The team identified a recurring gap: the 2-week pre-kickoff preparation window is consistently missed.](https://fathom.video/share/teAYxVNVVr7U_c4BzH4SNqbwSgKgD3js?tab=summary&timestamp=1705.0)
  - [**Root Cause:** Late client documentation and short-notice handoffs.](https://fathom.video/share/teAYxVNVVr7U_c4BzH4SNqbwSgKgD3js?tab=summary&timestamp=1577.0)
  - [**Solution:** Focus on stabilizing the current system before adding new steps.](https://fathom.video/share/teAYxVNVVr7U_c4BzH4SNqbwSgKgD3js?tab=summary&timestamp=1705.0)
      - [**Goal:** Ensure handoffs occur at least 2 weeks before kickoff.](https://fathom.video/share/teAYxVNVVr7U_c4BzH4SNqbwSgKgD3js?tab=summary&timestamp=1722.0)
      - [**Enabler:** The upcoming hiring of more Engagement Managers (EMs).](https://fathom.video/share/teAYxVNVVr7U_c4BzH4SNqbwSgKgD3js?tab=summary&timestamp=1763.0)

### Client Handoff: JAMA Software

  - [**Source:** Referral from XFunnel (acquired by HubSpot), which can no longer serve clients.](https://fathom.video/share/teAYxVNVVr7U_c4BzH4SNqbwSgKgD3js?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)
  - [**Primary Contact:** Fonny (Amsterdam-based), a results-focused "speed demon" with internal influence.](https://fathom.video/share/teAYxVNVVr7U_c4BzH4SNqbwSgKgD3js?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
  - [**Key Stakeholders:**](https://fathom.video/share/teAYxVNVVr7U_c4BzH4SNqbwSgKgD3js?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)
      - [**CRO (Tom):** Involved to connect content to sales pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/teAYxVNVVr7U_c4BzH4SNqbwSgKgD3js?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)
      - [**Creative Manager (Mario):** U.S.-based, manages writers.](https://fathom.video/share/teAYxVNVVr7U_c4BzH4SNqbwSgKgD3js?tab=summary&timestamp=590.0)
  - [**Challenge: Technical Content Quality**](https://fathom.video/share/teAYxVNVVr7U_c4BzH4SNqbwSgKgD3js?tab=summary&timestamp=702.0)
      - [**Client Requirement:** "Technical content quality that won't embarrass JAMA."](https://fathom.video/share/teAYxVNVVr7U_c4BzH4SNqbwSgKgD3js?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)
      - [**Risk:** Our standard workflow may not meet this SME-level depth, potentially leading to client dissatisfaction.](https://fathom.video/share/teAYxVNVVr7U_c4BzH4SNqbwSgKgD3js?tab=summary&timestamp=702.0)
  - [**Mitigating Factors:**](https://fathom.video/share/teAYxVNVVr7U_c4BzH4SNqbwSgKgD3js?tab=summary&timestamp=1255.0)
      - [**Current Content:** JAMA's top-performing articles are basic (e.g., "What is the AEC industry?"), suggesting low-hanging fruit for improvement.](https://fathom.video/share/teAYxVNVVr7U_c4BzH4SNqbwSgKgD3js?tab=summary&timestamp=1304.0)
      - [**Focus:** 80% Top-of-Funnel (ToFu) content, which is less technical.](https://fathom.video/share/teAYxVNVVr7U_c4BzH4SNqbwSgKgD3js?tab=summary&timestamp=1281.0)
      - [**Commitment:** Fonny views it as a minimum 1-year engagement, providing a long runway for results.](https://fathom.video/share/teAYxVNVVr7U_c4BzH4SNqbwSgKgD3js?tab=summary&timestamp=1291.0)

### Solution: Managing Technical Content Expectations

  - [The team defined a two-part strategy for clients with high technical demands.](https://fathom.video/share/teAYxVNVVr7U_c4BzH4SNqbwSgKgD3js?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)
  - [**External Communication (Sales & Kickoff):**](https://fathom.video/share/teAYxVNVVr7U_c4BzH4SNqbwSgKgD3js?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)
      - [Set clear expectations: "We are not subject matter experts (SMEs) in your field."](https://fathom.video/share/teAYxVNVVr7U_c4BzH4SNqbwSgKgD3js?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)
      - [Frame our role as driving visibility and traffic, not creating thought leadership.](https://fathom.video/share/teAYxVNVVr7U_c4BzH4SNqbwSgKgD3js?tab=summary&timestamp=945.0)
      - [Position the client's internal experts as the source for SME depth (e.g., voice notes).](https://fathom.video/share/teAYxVNVVr7U_c4BzH4SNqbwSgKgD3js?tab=summary&timestamp=873.0)
  - [**Internal Execution (Pipeline Optimization):**](https://fathom.video/share/teAYxVNVVr7U_c4BzH4SNqbwSgKgD3js?tab=summary&timestamp=1061.0)
      - [Involve a pipeline optimizer (e.g., Tammy) early (Week 2–3) to customize the workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/teAYxVNVVr7U_c4BzH4SNqbwSgKgD3js?tab=summary&timestamp=1061.0)
      - [Train the pipeline on "good examples" provided by the client to align with their quality standards.](https://fathom.video/share/teAYxVNVVr7U_c4BzH4SNqbwSgKgD3js?tab=summary&timestamp=1083.0)
      - [Create a dedicated "artifacts" folder with these examples for the pipeline to reference.](https://fathom.video/share/teAYxVNVVr7U_c4BzH4SNqbwSgKgD3js?tab=summary&timestamp=1083.0)

### Client Handoff: Assort Health

  - [**Lead:** Kathy requested this client due to industry interest.](https://fathom.video/share/teAYxVNVVr7U_c4BzH4SNqbwSgKgD3js?tab=summary&timestamp=1616.0)
  - [**Profile:** SF-based AI voice agent company for healthcare.](https://fathom.video/share/teAYxVNVVr7U_c4BzH4SNqbwSgKgD3js?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [**Status:** Early-stage with high growth potential.](https://fathom.video/share/teAYxVNVVr7U_c4BzH4SNqbwSgKgD3js?tab=summary&timestamp=1650.0)
  - [**Key Details:**](https://fathom.video/share/teAYxVNVVr7U_c4BzH4SNqbwSgKgD3js?tab=summary&timestamp=1616.0)
      - [Strong funding.](https://fathom.video/share/teAYxVNVVr7U_c4BzH4SNqbwSgKgD3js?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
      - [Highly engaged CEO.](https://fathom.video/share/teAYxVNVVr7U_c4BzH4SNqbwSgKgD3js?tab=summary&timestamp=1650.0)
      - [Low current traffic → 2x growth is a reasonable goal.](https://fathom.video/share/teAYxVNVVr7U_c4BzH4SNqbwSgKgD3js?tab=summary&timestamp=1663.0)
      - [Collaborative client.](https://fathom.video/share/teAYxVNVVr7U_c4BzH4SNqbwSgKgD3js?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler:**](https://fathom.video/share/teAYxVNVVr7U_c4BzH4SNqbwSgKgD3js?tab=summary&timestamp=1616.0)
      - [Meet with Kathy to provide a detailed handoff for Assort Health.](https://fathom.video/share/teAYxVNVVr7U_c4BzH4SNqbwSgKgD3js?tab=summary&timestamp=1616.0)
      - [Add explicit language to sales calls about our non-SME role for technical clients.](https://fathom.video/share/teAYxVNVVr7U_c4BzH4SNqbwSgKgD3js?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)
  - [**Aida:**](https://fathom.video/share/teAYxVNVVr7U_c4BzH4SNqbwSgKgD3js?tab=summary&timestamp=1492.0)
      - [Lead the JAMA kickoff on Feb 17 at 7 AM Pacific.](https://fathom.video/share/teAYxVNVVr7U_c4BzH4SNqbwSgKgD3js?tab=summary&timestamp=1377.0)
      - [Use a discovery-focused kickoff format to manage the tight timeline and late documentation.](https://fathom.video/share/teAYxVNVVr7U_c4BzH4SNqbwSgKgD3js?tab=summary&timestamp=1533.0)
  - [**William:**](https://fathom.video/share/teAYxVNVVr7U_c4BzH4SNqbwSgKgD3js?tab=summary&timestamp=1377.0)
      - [Assign JAMA to Aida.](https://fathom.video/share/teAYxVNVVr7U_c4BzH4SNqbwSgKgD3js?tab=summary&timestamp=1492.0)
  - [**Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/teAYxVNVVr7U_c4BzH4SNqbwSgKgD3js?tab=summary&timestamp=1061.0)
      - [Involve a pipeline optimizer (e.g., Tammy) early for JAMA to customize the workflow for technical content.](https://fathom.video/share/teAYxVNVVr7U_c4BzH4SNqbwSgKgD3js?tab=summary&timestamp=1061.0)
